name: accounting firms managing 5–15 petty cash transactions/week tool
description: For accounting firms managing 5–15 petty cash transactions/week, manual reconciliation causes reporting delays. We consolidate and reconcile transactions instead of manual spreadsheets and email summaries.
target_audience: accounting firms managing 5–15 petty cash transactions/week
problem_solved: manual reconciliation of petty cash transactions leads to errors and delays in reporting.
features: manual entry of petty cash transactions
